infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Allow $(PRODUCT_NAME) to use the camera to scan QR codes.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Allow $(PRODUCT_NAME) to show your position on the delivery map and detect when you are near the destination.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Allow $(PRODUCT_NAME) to attach a delivery photo.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow $(PRODUCT_NAME) to access your camera to scan QR codes.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Allow $(PRODUCT_NAME) to use your location on the map and near-destination alerts.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow $(PRODUCT_NAME) to choose a delivery photo.
